_comment: Live 35B applied-patch set for pin 0.23.1rc1.dev148+gb4c80ec0f. These patches APPLY CLEANLY at runtime against the deployed tree — they are the disjointness oracle for tools/check_upstream_drift.py. The set of patch IDs the drift tool reports as genuine anchor_drift / import_drift against the PRISTINE dev148 tree MUST be DISJOINT from this set (a patch that applies cleanly at runtime cannot have drifted anchors). Source: controller-provided ground truth, 2026-06-13.
